title: A bit of of an eva game
display_title: A bit of of an eva game
wikitext:
[]: A bit of of an eva game             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Mon Jul 11, 2005 1:28 am I an not sure whether this would go under Chit-Chat or omake. So I just put in Chit chat. Reichu if you need to move it, then please do. Could you then just inform me then. Ryo gave me this idea indirectly through one of his posts. I would like to thank him. Anyways, back to the game. You have to pick a character from evangelion ( any of the characters, If I remeber there is about 18 or 19)or any of the angels or even tokyo 3 and put a moive title next to it. An example would be Rei - Attack of the clones Tokyo 3 - Sin city Shinji ( or Asuka if you want) - Top gun The idea of the game is to make it not only funny but also relate to the character or angels ( characteristic) personality in some way. I rate this thread a 3.5/10 to survive 10 days. Oh well.

[]: A bit of of an eva game             Quote Post by Timesplitter 01 » Mon Jul 11, 2005 1:28 am I an not sure whether this would go under Chit-Chat or omake. So I just put in Chit chat. Reichu if you need to move it, then please do. Could you then just inform me then. Ryo gave me this idea indirectly through one of his posts. I would like to thank him. Anyways, back to the game. You have to pick a character from evangelion ( any of the characters, If I remeber there is about 18 or 19)or any of the angels or even tokyo 3 and put a moive title next to it. An example would be Rei - Attack of the clones Tokyo 3 - Sin city Shinji ( or Asuka if you want) - Top gun The idea of the game is to make it not only funny but also relate to the character or angels ( characteristic) personality in some way. I rate this thread a 3.5/10 to survive 10 days. Oh well.
